feature_name: P0 task and reminder module page specification
goal: define the frozen P0 requirements for the task and reminder module so internal users can manage pending work, due-date reminders, and system-generated follow-up tasks that support case progression
must_have: task list page with the specified columns, default filters, and bulk actions
workbench views for my tasks, due today, and overdue tasks
task detail showing description, related case, assignee, due date, and operation record
reminder log showing internal notification send time, recipient, and status
task creation, assignment, completion, due-date adjustment, and cancellation actions
system auto-generation of tasks from template case creation and supplement notice flows
internal reminder behavior for key due dates and basic escalation to the responsible owner
permission behavior constrained by administrator, lead owner, and assistant roles
out_of_scope: external reminder channels such as email, IM, or SMS
business_rules: P0 uses internal notifications as the primary reminder channel and does not depend on external delivery
tasks support the states todo, doing, done, and canceled
canceling a task requires a reason and must leave an audit record
overdue unfinished tasks are highlighted and surfaced as risk signals
system-generated tasks after template case creation or supplement notice must avoid duplicate generation
key reminder categories are residence expiry, supplement due date, submission due date, and billing milestone
basic escalation is limited to client non-response triggering a reminder to the responsible owner
all reminder touchpoints must leave traces
task visibility and editability follow role, group, and case-context constraints
edge_cases: empty task state with no pending work guidance
overdue unfinished tasks requiring visible risk highlighting
duplicate prevention for automatically generated task batches
reminder delivery failure with recorded failure reason
acceptance_criteria: the list page renders the required task fields, filters, and bulk actions
the module exposes workbench views for my tasks, due today, and overdue tasks
task detail renders description, related case link, assignee, due date, and operation record
reminder log records internal notification send time, recipient, and status
authorized users can create, assign, complete, adjust due date, and cancel tasks according to the permission model
auto-generated tasks are created from template case creation and supplement notice flows without unwanted duplicates
overdue tasks and reminder failures are visibly represented in the module
P0 behavior remains limited to internal reminders and excludes configurable rules and external channels
